title: apium angustilobum
intro: Apium angustilobum, also known as Chinese celery or narrow-leaved celery, is a type of plant in the carrot family that belongs to the genus Apium. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive-aiding effects. The health benefits of Apium angustilobum include its ability to relieve digestive issues such as bloating and cramps, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Apium angustilobum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
